summary: Workspaces scheduled for migration are unavailable during cutover window.

updates.details: Check the schedule to see dates for specific workspaces.

summary: Advance notice of next regular scheduled maintenance day

updates.details: Scheduled maintenance day Tuesday 14 July 2026: expect disruption to all CEDA & JASMIN services. Please plan your work accordingly.

summary: Longer wait times due to staff shortage

updates.details: Wait times for SSH access are currently longer than usual. We apologise for any inconvenience.
Capacity to process requests will be further reduced during 15-19th June.

summary: Slurm jobs failing or stuck in CG state

updates.details: Some Slurm jobs on LOTUS are failing or becoming stuck, we are currently investigating this issue. Apologies for any inconvenience.
Various hosts having issues with GPUs, including GPUs not initialising. Cluster has been drained and investigation is ongoing.

summary: Tape library having issues, recalls with be delayed

updates.details: Tape service is having issues mounting tapes, so recalls will be delayed.
Tape recalls will be down tomorrow, Tue 2nd June.

Following last week's power issues, LOTUS & Jupyter Notebooks service still unavailable due to scratch disk /work/scratch-pw4 reconstructing. A plan is currently being prepared to replace this volume with a new empty volume, in order to re-enable these services more quickly. Details to follow.
Awaiting progress with PFS storage issue before plan to restore LOTUS and Notebook access can proceed.
Team now able to proceed (tomorrow, Tuesday) with plan to create replacement for /work/scratch-pw4. Further updates about re-enabling of LOTUS and Notebook service to follow.
An issue is currently affecting ALL pfs volumes, team is investigating with vendor support.
Issue is still under investigation with the vendor, PFS storage volumes still unavailable as well as preventing progress with the plan to restore LOTUS and the Notebook service.
Issue with PFS resolved EXCEPT for /work/scratch-pw4 which is still reconstructing.
